description.en: Small, fluffy fried breakfast puffs from Madagascar, their rice-and-wheat batter yeasted and enriched with coconut milk and grated coconut. Cooked a few at a time in a multi-cavity pan and sold hot by street vendors alongside sweet coffee.
description.de: Kleine, fluffige, frittierte Frühstückspuffs aus Madagaskar, ihr Reis-Weizen-Teig mit Hefe gelockert und mit Kokosmilch und geriebener Kokosnuss angereichert. In einer Pfanne mit mehreren Mulden gebacken und heiß von Straßenhändlern zu süßem Kaffee verkauft.
description.es: Pequeños y esponjosos buñuelos de desayuno de Madagascar, su masa de arroz y trigo fermentada y enriquecida con leche de coco y coco rallado. Se cocinan de a pocos en un molde de varias cavidades y se venden calientes por vendedores callejeros junto a café dulce.
description.fr: De petits beignets moelleux du petit-déjeuner malgache, leur pâte de riz et de blé levée puis enrichie de lait de coco et de coco râpé. Cuits par petites quantités dans une poêle à empreintes multiples et vendus chauds par les marchands ambulants avec un café sucré.

origin.note: Sold by street vendors from large multi-cavity pans each morning; the name simply means 'Malagasy bread' and distinguishes it from mofo baolina and other local breads.

yield.shape: small puffs from a multi-cavity pan

keeping.note: Best eaten warm the same morning; leftovers can be frozen and reheated, though the fluffiness fades.

method.title: Bloom yeast
method.summary: Dissolve a little sugar and the yeast in warm water; let rest about 10 minutes until frothy.

method.title: Mix batter
method.summary: Whisk together the flours, salt and remaining sugar, then stir in vanilla, the yeast mixture and coconut milk into a smooth, thick batter.

method.title: First rise
method.summary: Cover and let sit in a warm spot 1 to 1.5 hours until roughly doubled.

method.title: Fold in coconut
method.summary: Stir in the grated coconut and let the batter rise again 30 to 45 minutes.

method.title: Cook
method.summary: Heat an oiled aebleskiver or appe pan over low heat, fill each cavity with batter, cover, and cook a few minutes per side until golden and cooked through.

method.title: Serve
method.summary: Turn the puffs out and serve them warm with sweetened coffee.

source.adaptation: Cup/tablespoon quantities converted to grams; rice semolina, coconut milk and grated coconut weights estimated since no standard conversion exists for them.
